findings.description: RST cross-reference syntax `` `バッチ処理における取引単体テスト`_ `` is left verbatim in the Markdown content. In the RST source this is an internal section link, but in a Markdown knowledge file it renders as literal text with a trailing underscore rather than a usable link.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `バッチ処理における取引単体テスト`_\nKnowledge: `バッチ処理における取引単体テスト`_と同様に
